emails.subject: Financial Index Curves
emails.body: Financial Index Curves Mike the exact path and name of the Financial Curve File is: O:\ERMS\1ntra\CURVES\GDI West II.xls It would be better for us if you would set the financial index curves in this file, just like you do the Physical index curves in the other file. Let me know what you decide. Thanks Anne

emails.subject: RE: Financial Index Curves
emails.body: RE: Financial Index Curves I do not have access to this file. I requested access to the curves directory. Do I need specific access to the file? Thanks, Mike To: Grigsby, Mike

emails.subject: RE: Financial Index Curves
emails.body: I did not realize this, but you have been denied access to the Risk files for control purposes. We moved both the financial and the physical index curves to your directory. Here are the details: Physical Index Curves: O:\ECT_Trading\West\Position Manager\GD-West\West Phy Index1.xls Financial Index Curves: O:\ECT_Trading\West\Position Manager\GD-West\GDI West II.xls Thanks Anne To: Bike, Anne
